# Naming system overview

The system uses four layers.

## 1. Domain

```text
AVT = Algorithmic Video Transmission
```

## 2. Hypothesis ID

Legacy IDs are preserved, but padded IDs are preferred.

```text
Legacy: H7
Preferred: H007
```

## 3. Formal mechanism code

```text
AVT-[FAMILY]-[SPECIES]-[HYPOTHESIS_ID]
```

Example:

```text
AVT-ATT-PRIM-091
```

## 4. Scientific-style name

```text
*Genus species* var. hNNN-short-slug
```

Example:

```text
*Salientia primafacialis* var. h091-videos-show-payoff
```

## Family taxonomy

| Code | Genus | Family | Meaning |
|---|---|---|---|
| CLS | Claritas | Classification / legibility | Whether the viewer and platform can classify the topic. |
| ATT | Salientia | Attention / first-frame salience | Whether the video earns the right to be watched. |
| TEN | Tensio | Hook tension / information gap | Whether the opening creates unresolved but honest tension. |
| COG | Cognitio | Comprehension / cognitive load | Whether text, captions, visuals, and pacing reduce processing friction. |
| RET | Retentio | Retention / story progress | Whether the body sustains attention through payoff and change. |
| TRN | Transmissio | Social transmission / sharing | Whether the video is socially transferable. |
| ACT | Actio | Action design / CTA | Whether the video converts attention into saves, sends, comments, follows, or clicks. |
| FID | Fides | Trust / proof / originality | Whether evidence and creator judgment preserve trust. |
| SEA | Quaeribilitas | Search / long-tail demand | Whether the video can be found and remain useful over time. |
| MEM | Memoria | Series / audience memory | Whether the video belongs to a repeatable account promise. |
| MED | Mediagrammatica | Platform grammar | Whether the idea is translated to the platform surface. |
| FOR | Forma | Content form mechanics | Whether the format-specific mechanics fit the video form. |
| VER | Verticalis | Vertical / niche mechanics | Whether the strategy fits the niche or industry. |
| EXP | Experimentum | Testing / measurement | Whether the claim is measured through a disciplined design. |
| RSK | Custodia | Risk / decision control | Whether the tactic preserves trust and provides kill/scale rules. |

## Why use this system

Bad naming:

```text
the hook thing
the text test
the video algorithm idea
```

Good naming:

```text
H094 / AVT-TEN-UNCU-094 / *Tensio uncus* var. h094-specific-hooks-beat
M-SVT / *Variatio singularis*
CTV / chose-to-view
```

This makes research traceable.
